case_title: JESUS LOSA VS. BERNARDO HERNANDEZ AREVALO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., (SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFULL/BAD ADDRESS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOSA, JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, BERNARDO HERNANDEZ
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LOSA, JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, BERNARDO HERNANDEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (9 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LOSA, JESUS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOSA, JESUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AREVALO, BERNARDO HERNANDEZ $520.28 PRINCIPAL, $112.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $632.78, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2081.13, AND ATTRIBUTES 75% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED JUL-08-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, BERNARDO HERNANDEZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
